hook: Your wholeness was never a deliverable.
caption:
Your wholeness was never a deliverable.

You spent years becoming better at your job and further from yourself. Every review measured your output but never asked what you actually wanted from this life.

AI is now handling the output. What remains is the question the job always crowded out: what do I want? For most workers, that question has been buried for 15 years. That is not a breakdown. It is the first honest moment of your career.

David Whyte left marine biology to become a poet. Fortune 500 executives now pay him to sit in silence and read verse. That is the only work AI cannot replace.

Start there.

#postai #futureofwork #meaningfulwork
